annotations.label: Unitary matrix

anchor.snippet: an invertible complex square matrix U is unitary if its matrix inverse

annotations.note: `Matrix.unitaryGroup` plus `mem_unitaryGroup_iff` (A ∈ unitaryGroup ↔ A * star A = 1) directly encode the definition of a unitary matrix.

annotations.label: Special unitary matrix

anchor.snippet: A complex matrix U is special unitary if it is unitary and its matrix determinant equals

annotations.note: `Matrix.specialUnitaryGroup` is defined as the unitary group intersected with the kernel of det, and `mem_specialUnitaryGroup_iff` states A ∈ specialUnitaryGroup ↔ A ∈ unitaryGroup ∧ det A = 1.

annotations.label: Preservation of inner product

anchor.snippet: multiplication by U preserves their inner product

annotations.note: `inner_map_map_of_mem_unitary` (and `Unitary.inner_map_map`) states that unitary continuous linear maps on a Hilbert space preserve the inner product, subsuming the matrix case via Euclidean space.

annotations.label: Unitary is normal
annotations.note: `isStarNormal_of_mem_unitary` (and the `instIsStarNormal` instance) shows every unitary element of a star ring is star-normal, directly giving normality of unitary matrices.

annotations.label: Unitary is diagonalizable
annotations.note: No statement of unitary diagonalizability for unitary matrices was found; only the Hermitian spectral theorem (`Matrix.IsHermitian.eigenvectorUnitary`) is formalized.

annotations.label: Eigenvalues on unit circle
annotations.note: `Unitary.spectrum_subset_circle` and `spectrum.norm_eq_one_of_unitary` show the spectrum of any unitary element in a unital C*-algebra (covering matrices) lies on the unit circle.

annotations.label: Eigenspaces orthogonal
annotations.note: Mathlib has `orthogonalFamily_eigenspaces` for self-adjoint/symmetric operators but no direct statement that the eigenspaces of a unitary (or general normal) operator are mutually orthogonal.

annotations.label: Exponential of Hermitian form

anchor.snippet: can be written as U = e iH

annotations.note: `selfAdjoint.expUnitary` defines the map `a ↦ exp(i·a)` from self-adjoint to unitary in a C*-algebra, but the surjectivity (every unitary is `exp(iH)` for some Hermitian H) is not proven.

annotations.label: Unitary group U(n)

anchor.snippet: the set of all n × n unitary matrices with matrix multiplication forms a group

annotations.note: `Matrix.unitaryGroup n α` is defined as a submonoid with inherited `Group` and `StarMul` instances, matching the unitary group U(n).

annotations.label: Average of two unitaries

anchor.snippet: Every square matrix with unit Euclidean norm is the average of two unitary matrices

annotations.note: No grep hits for any statement that a unit-norm matrix is an average of two unitaries.

annotations.label: Equivalent conditions for unitarity
annotations.note: `mem_unitaryGroup_iff` (A * star A = 1) and `mem_unitaryGroup_iff'` (star A * A = 1) cover two equivalences, but no consolidated TFAE listing isometry/columns-orthonormal/etc. is present.

annotations.label: General 2 × 2 unitary matrix

anchor.snippet: One general expression of a 2 × 2 unitary matrix is

annotations.note: No explicit parametric form for 2×2 unitary matrices was found (analogous `of_mem_specialOrthogonalGroup_fin_two_iff` exists for SO(2), but not for U(2)).

annotations.label: Special unitary group SU(2)

anchor.snippet: is called the special unitary group SU(2)

annotations.note: SU(2) is obtained as `Matrix.specialUnitaryGroup (Fin 2) ℂ`; no dedicated SU(2) declaration exists but the general specialUnitaryGroup specializes to it.

annotations.label: Alternative form of 2 × 2 unitary

anchor.snippet: the matrix U can be written in this form

annotations.note: No alternate 2×2 unitary parametrization was found in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Factorization via orthogonal matrices
annotations.note: No 2×2 unitary factorization through orthogonal matrices was located in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Another factorization
annotations.note: No such alternate 2×2 unitary factorization is formalized in Mathlib.
